description: After completing forensic analysis, investigators must produce formal reports suitable for case files. Create a forensic case named 'DA_Report_Case_2024' (Case Number: INV-RPT-006) in Autopsy using the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Perform the analysis using only the 'File Type Identification', 'Hash Lookup', and 'Recent Activity' ingest modules. Generate an HTML report covering all results and data sources. Finally, write a case summary memo to /home/ga/Reports/case_summary_memo.txt containing exactly these colon-separated keys and their corresponding values: 'CASE_NAME: DA_Report_Case_2024', 'CASE_NUMBER: INV-RPT-006', 'DATA_SOURCE: ntfs_undel.dd', 'REPORT_FORMAT: HTML', 'REPORT_LOCATION: <full path to the directory containing the HTML index file>', 'TOTAL_FILES_ANALYZED: <number of files analyzed/found>', 'INGEST_MODULES_RUN: File Type Identification, Hash Lookup, Recent Activity', 'ANALYSIS_COMPLETE: YES'.
